item.title: Things to Know Before Building a House
item.description: From planning to pitfalls, the brothers share essential advice. What must‑know tips save time and money?

media:content.media:title: Things to Know Before Building a House
media:content.media:description: From planning to pitfalls, the brothers share essential advice. What must‑know tips save time and money?

item.title: Door fitting tips
item.description: Precision matters when fitting doors. What simple tricks make installation smoother and longer‑lasting?

media:content.media:title: Door fitting tips
media:content.media:description: Precision matters when fitting doors. What simple tricks make installation smoother and longer‑lasting?

item.title: Testing floor materials
item.description: Durability meets design as different floor materials go head‑to‑head. Which option stands up best under pressure?

media:content.media:description: Durability meets design as different floor materials go head‑to‑head. Which option stands up best under pressure?

item.title: Decks in Shape
item.description: From framing to finishing, the brothers show how to keep decks sturdy and stylish. What’s their go‑to technique?

media:content.media:title: Decks in Shape
media:content.media:description: From framing to finishing, the brothers show how to keep decks sturdy and stylish. What’s their go‑to technique?

item.title: Perkins Builder Brothers: Deck Gets a New Look
item.description: The Perkins Builder Brothers give a deck a fresh transformation — craftsmanship and creativity in action. What’s your favorite way to refresh outdoor spaces?

media:content.media:title: Perkins Builder Brothers: Deck Gets a New Look
media:content.media:description: The Perkins Builder Brothers give a deck a fresh transformation — craftsmanship and creativity in action. What’s your favorite way to refresh outdoor spaces?

item.title: Weathering Storms and Building Dreams
item.description: Through challenges and setbacks, the builder’s dream pushes forward. What’s the biggest storm you’ve had to weather in your projects?

media:content.media:title: Weathering Storms and Building Dreams
media:content.media:description: Through challenges and setbacks, the builder’s dream pushes forward. What’s the biggest storm you’ve had to weather in your projects?

item.title: Choosing the Right Hammers for Your Toolkit
item.description: Not all hammers are created equal. This clip breaks down which ones belong in every builder’s kit. Which hammer do you reach for most often?

media:content.media:title: Choosing the Right Hammers for Your Toolkit
media:content.media:description: Not all hammers are created equal. This clip breaks down which ones belong in every builder’s kit. Which hammer do you reach for most often?

item.title: Tips & Tricks | Pressure‑Treated Wood
item.description: Working with pressure‑treated wood? Here are the tips and tricks to make it last and perform. What’s your best advice for handling treated lumber?

media:content.media:description: Working with pressure‑treated wood? Here are the tips and tricks to make it last and perform. What’s your best advice for handling treated lumber?

item.title: You Can Almost See the Rooms Now | Nantahala #10
item.description: The Nantahala build reaches a stage where rooms begin to take shape. Which part of framing makes a house finally feel like a home?

item.title: Building a Home in the Wilderness, Part One
item.description: Remote, rugged, and rewarding — Part One shows the challenges of building a home deep in the wilderness. What’s the toughest obstacle in off‑grid building?

item.title: One Easy Trick to Stop Cables Tangling EVER Again
item.description: No more mess — this simple trick keeps cables neat and tangle‑free. What’s your favorite hack for cable management?

item.title: The Shameful Secrets Contractors Won’t Tell You
item.description: Behind the scenes of construction, some secrets aren’t shared. This clip reveals what contractors don’t want you to know. Which hidden shortcut do you think is most common?

item.title: Two Days of Laying Blocks | Basement Build
item.description: Hard work and precision — two full days of block laying bring the basement walls to life. What’s your secret for keeping blockwork perfectly level?

item.title: Nostalgia: The Life of a Builder
item.description: A look back at the challenges, triumphs, and memories that define the builder’s journey. What’s the most nostalgic moment from your building days?
